headline: Wells Fargo Sets $230 Target on Dover as Short-Cycle Recovery Gains Steam
summary: Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) has traded with notable momentum over the past year. Most analysts carry moderate forecasts, with the Street consensus target near $224 to $225. But Wells Fargo analyst Joseph O’Dea just stepped well above that crowd, upgrading DOV to Overweight with a $230 price target. That target sits above the updated consensus of ... Wells Fargo Sets $230 Target on Dover as Short-Cycle Recovery Gains Steam

headline: Wells Fargo Upgrades Dover to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $230
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joseph O'Dea   upgrades Dover (NYSE:DOV) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $210 to $230.
